messages.content: Build a marketing landing page for our Q3 launch.

response.content: {"steps":[{"verb":"POST","url":"http://127.0.0.1:8001/projects","rationale":"Create the Q3 launch landing project"},{"verb":"GET","url":"http://127.0.0.1:8002/people?skill=copywriting&available=true","rationale":"Find an available copywriter"},{"verb":"POST","url":"http://127.0.0.1:8001/projects/{proj_id}/tasks","rationale":"Create copy task"},{"verb":"POST","url":"http://127.0.0.1:8003/messages","rationale":"Notify the assignee"}]}
